# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

Resource | Type | ID | Role | Access | Condition
------------ | ------------- | ------------- | ------------- | ------------- | -------------
storage_read | Storage | /subscriptions/**{subscriptionId}**/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/{storageAccountName} | Reader | Read access to the storage account.
service | FunctionApp | /subscriptions/**{subscriptionId}**/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Web/sites/{functionAppName} | Reader | Access to read and configure Azure Services.
keyvault_read | KeyVault | /subscriptions/**{subscriptionId}**/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/*?tenantId=**{azureTenantId}** | Contributor | Read, Update, List Keys and Secrets of the Key Vault.
sqldb_server_reader | SQLDatabase | /subscriptions/**{subscriptionId}**/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers//**{sqlServerResourceId}** | db_datareader | Select Azure Services to read SQL Server.
cosmosDB_reader | CosmosDBAccount | /subscriptions/**{subscriptionId}**/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.DocumentDB/**{dbaccountname}**/regions/**{region}**/databaseAccounts | CosmosDBReader | Azure Service - Read and List Documents, Query and Upsert documents from Cosmos DB Account.
